OpenPraxis Portal V2

Foundation scaffold pending. This is the dual-port plumbing stub.

Status

● Portal V2 listener up. Same Go binary, same DB, same backend as Portal A.

Portal A still live on :8765 (legacy + experiment). Portal V2 is here on the configured port.

Hash routes (planned)

  • #overview
  • #active
  • #catalog
  • #inbox
  • #recall
  • #productivity
  • #audit
  • #activity
  • #settings

Next chunk

Scaffold shadcn-admin shell into internal/web/ui/dashboard-v2/, replace this stub with a real React app, wire the API client to this same port.
